name: Jumbo Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeIngredient: if using self-rising flour, omit baking soda and salt.
recipeInstructions: Heat oven to 375°F. Mix sugars, margarine, and egg. Stir in flour, baking soda, and salt (dough will be stiff). Stir in nuts and chocolate chips. Drop dough by 1/4 cupfuls about 3 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheet. Bake 12 to 15 minutes or until edges are set. Cool completely; remove from cookie sheet. Approximately 1-1/2 dozen cookies; 360 calories per cookie.
